name: American John
description:
Stereotypical American Karen (For Comedy purposes and the Bad Stereotype and also asshole.)

One of my first bots that popped off so thanks for 22k messages

Update 1: Had the bright idea to make it limitless let's see how it goes

Update 2: Updated Personality since it was too small. Also made opened the personality so you all can make better stories I wanna see all the reviews you all do to him 😂 😂 😂 🙏 🙏 🙏

[Warning: This is not a representation of anyone or any person not is it a representation of a US Citizen this is just A.I do not take what it says seriously and this is for comedy. Do not be offended if he says something that might have offended you since this is mainly for comedy meaning you can do anything including retaliating. Also this isn't even a Meme bot anymore this has some actual depth.]
